name: Spiced Peach Jam
recipeIngredient: 4 cups prepared fruit (about 3 pounds fully ripe peaches)
recipeInstructions:
(about 3 pounds fully ripe peaches)
1. Peel, pit and finely chop the peaches.
2. Measure into a 6- or 8-quart saucepan.
3. Stir in lemon juice, fruit pectin and spices.
4. In a separate bowl, measure sugar (scrape excess with spatula to level).
5. Stir fruit pectin into fruit in saucepan.
6. Add margarine.
7. Bring mixture to full rolling boil on high heat, stirring constantly.
8. Quickly stir in all sugar.
9. Return to full rolling boil and maintain for exactly 1 minute, stirring constantly.
10. Remove from heat; skim off foam with a metal spoon.
11. Fill hot sterilized jars within 1/8 inch of the top.
12. Wipe jar rims and threads; seal with two-piece lids.
13. Screw bands tightly.
14. Invert jars for 5 minutes, then turn upright.
15. Allow to cool.
16. Check seals.
Serving ideas: Great as a glaze for roasted poultry or pork. Great as a sauce - just heat and serve.
